title: schradera korthalsiana subsp. korthalsiana
intro: Schradera korthalsiana subsp. korthalsiana is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The roots of Schradera korthalsiana subsp. korthalsiana are reported to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
